productDisplayName: ASICS Men Gel DS 16 Running White Sports Shoes
description: Kick start your training plan with a swift ride in the asics GEL-DS Trainer 16. With just the right amount of stability that you need, you'll be miles down the busy city streets before heading home.UpperOpen mesh upper for a highly breathable environmentSynthetic leather overlays for enhanced shoe structureBiomorphic Fit with a stretch material strategically placed throughout the upper to reduce buckling and provide an exceptional fit and feelAsymmetrical lacing to minimize irritation and heighten fit and comfort3M reflective elements allow visibility even in low light conditionsClutch Collar System - An endoskelatal collar works together with the exoskelatal heel counter to promote a personalized fitMidsoleComforDry sockliner offers anti-microbial properties for a drier, healthier environmentDuoMax dual-density midsole is specifically positioned for running to enhance support and stabilitySolyte midsole is lighter in weight than asics' standard EVA and SpEVA. Its responsive nature delivers a supremely cushioned ride and makes it highly durableRearfoot & forefoot Gel cushioning systems work together to better attenuate impacting shock and allow the foot to move fluidly throughout the gait cycleOutsoleI.G.S (Impact Guidance System) employs linked component to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel-strike through toe-offPropulsion Trusstic mimics connective tissues in the foot by creating tension as the foot enters the propulsion phaseGuidance Line technology employs a vertical flex groove that decouples the tooling along the line of progression for maximum stride efficiencyDuoSole outsole is lightweight and flexible, while still supplying exceptional traction and long-lasting wearDuraSponge forefoot outsole material is comprised of a blown AHAR rubber for superior cushioning and long-lasting wearWet Grip outsole is constructed of a mixture of organic and non-organic compounds, designed to enhance traction on wet surfacesAHAR (ASICS High Abrasion Rubber) heel plug provides excellent durability in this high-wear areaDual-density Solyte lasting design allows for different densities of Solyte material to be used in the heel and forefoot for improved comfortShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
